productDisplayName: Nike Men Court Majestic Black Shoes
description: Style Note Designed with a low-top silhouette for the tennis player, the nike Court Majestic lives true to its name and offers a stylish look with exemplary comfort. With a cushioned sockliner and a grippy outsole, this shoe also doubles as a perfect casual sneaker. Product Details Synthetic leather upper with Nike swoosh overlays on either side of the midfoot for style Lacing system for a snug, customised Fit Cushioned tongue and collar for snug comfort Padded footbed for enhanced cushioning and impact protection Phylon midsole for absolute shock absorption and lightweight comfort TPR outsole with herringbone grooves for optimal traction Material and Care Synthetic Wipe with a clean damp cloth to remove dust Do not store in sunlight
